Look I understand the hype for Spotify. I love it myself, but I don't use it often for reasons I wanna list simply. First one is why do I need premium just to loop a song, rewind a song all that? I feel like that should be for everyone considering all other Music apps allows that to everyone without paying. Second thing is why do y'all randomly shuffle music? Like when I choose a song it plays something completely different. It's stuck on shuffle, because again we have to pay to not feel too "limited" in this app. All my complaints are really on premium, but I got something about the ad's too. Why do y'all randomly bring out over 1 minute ad's?? At max Spotify ad's should be 30 seconds and no higher... I wanna give y'all a chance, but I feel too limited to keep coming back. I hope y'all don't take this in a bad light, but I just wanna be honest on my thoughts and something y'all could actually improve on if y'all listen unlike other companies be doing nowadays. So 3 stars honestly it's still solid for what it is.

2026 Update: There are so many duplicates of songs. So many. Not talking about 10th anniversary versions or single versions but those exist too. I have 4 different duplicates of Maggie Rodger’s Alaska on one of my artist playlists, when they are the exact song (plus I have a single of the same song saved). Each of these are linked to a copy of the standard album. These are not singles, not extended versions, not an anniversary edition, not a greatest hit version, not an acoustic version, just the same song. This clogs my library. Terrible redundancy. Messes up with shuffling into the same song multiple times. I would guess 5-25% of my library would be fixed with this. This also takes more storage on my phone when I want to download my saved songs from an artist. I also dislike when I save a song from the original album then it gets switch to a random compilation of the song and instead of the original artwork and details it shows up as ‘run dance compilation’ with some random artwork. Easily my most frustrating thing with Spotify.   We need smart playlists. I don’t know why I need to manually add my favorite songs released in 2026 onto a playlist, when I could build that into a playlist then those songs get added automatically when I save them into my library.   Need a lyric page on mobile. Way frustrating to manually scroll and click to it each time.   Dream would be to be able to cast lyrics to a TV with karaoke style. So surprising that this is not possible with smart phones and smart TVs.   Thanks for reading and considering these updates.
